---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# CustomDataModule { #json2vec.CustomDataModule }

```python
CustomDataModule(
    model,
    train=None,
    validate=None,
    test=None,
    predict=None,
    preprocessor=None,
    datasets=None,
    num_workers=None,
    persistent_workers=True,
    pin_memory=True,
    observation_buffer_size=1,
    sample_rate=1.0,
    **kwargs,
)
```

Lightning data module for user-provided iterable datasets.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [train_dataloader](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.train_dataloader) |  |
| [val_dataloader](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.val_dataloader) |  |
| [test_dataloader](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.test_dataloader) |  |
| [predict_dataloader](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.predict_dataloader) |  |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [dataloader](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.dataloader) |  |

### dataloader { #json2vec.CustomDataModule.dataloader }

```python
dataloader(strata, required=True)
```
